soilPreparation.title: Nasaeh Asasiya Litahdir Al-Turba
soilPreparation.excerpt: Taallam nasaeh ihtirafiya litahdir al-turba qabl mawsem al-ziraa wa ziadat al-intaj...
soilPreparation.author: Admin
points: Nasiha: Choose the right tiller for your soil type.
Nasiha: Remove weeds and leftover crop residue before planting.
Nasiha: Maintain proper soil moisture before tilling.
Nasiha: Use cultivators for better aeration and root growth.
Nasiha: Break large soil clods before seed placement.
Nasiha: Level the field to avoid waterlogging in low spots.
Nasiha: Add compost or organic manure before final cultivation.
Nasiha: Avoid working soil when it is too wet or sticky.
Nasiha: Check soil pH and correct nutrient imbalance early.
Nasiha: Prepare raised beds for vegetables and delicate crops.
Nasiha: Keep tiller blades clean and sharp for uniform soil mixing.
Nasiha: Use shallow cultivation around existing roots.
Nasiha: Plan drainage channels before the rainy season.
Nasiha: Rotate crops to maintain soil health.
Nasiha: Do a final light pass before sowing for smooth seed beds.

powerTools.title: Siyanat Adawat Al-Taqa
powerTools.excerpt: Dalil kamil litanzif wa siyanat adawat al-taqa alsinaiya litawil alumr wal salama...
powerTools.author: Khabir Zirai
points: Nasiha: Clean tools after every use.
Nasiha: Remove soil, dust, and crop residue from blades.
Nasiha: Check engine oil before starting.
Nasiha: Clean or replace air filters regularly.
Nasiha: Tighten loose nuts, bolts, and screws.
Nasiha: Sharpen blades when cutting performance decreases.
Nasiha: Check fuel lines for leakage.
Nasiha: Store tools in a dry and shaded place.
Nasiha: Lubricate moving parts regularly.
Nasiha: Inspect power cables and switches.
Nasiha: Replace damaged blades immediately.
Nasiha: Use only recommended fuel or power source.
Nasiha: Avoid overloading the machine.
Nasiha: Follow manufacturer safety instructions.
Nasiha: Service the tool at regular intervals.

irrigation.title: Taqniyat Al-Rayy Al-Haditha
irrigation.excerpt: Iktashif anzimat rayy tawaffir al-miyah wa tughayir al-ziraa alhaditha fi India...
irrigation.author: Editor
points: Nasiha: Use drip irrigation to save water in row crops.
Nasiha: Maintain pumps and filters regularly.
Nasiha: Choose quality hoses, pipes, and connectors.
Nasiha: Monitor water pressure during irrigation.
Nasiha: Install filters before drip lines to reduce clogging.
Nasiha: Flush drip pipes at regular intervals.
Nasiha: Use sprinklers for even coverage in open fields.
Nasiha: Select pump capacity based on field size and head height.
Nasiha: Repair leaks quickly to prevent water loss.
Nasiha: Schedule irrigation early morning or evening.
Nasiha: Group crops with similar water needs together.
Nasiha: Use rain guns for larger field coverage.
Nasiha: Check nozzles for blockage before every cycle.
Nasiha: Protect pipes from direct damage during field operations.
Nasiha: Track soil moisture before increasing watering time.
